title: PM Kisan 23rd Installment Expected in June–July 2026 — Complete eKYC Now
author: Ashutosh Khulbe
excerpt: The 22nd installment was released on March 13, 2026. Here's when to expect the 23rd installment and what you need to do before it arrives.
key_stat: 9.32 crore farmers received Rs 18,640 crore in 22nd installment
body: The 22nd installment of PM Kisan Samman Nidhi was released on March 13, 2026, transferring Rs 18,640 crore to 9.32 crore farmers across India. The 23rd installment is expected to arrive in June–July 2026, though the government has not announced an official date yet.

PM Kisan provides Rs 6,000 per year to eligible farming families in three installments of Rs 2,000 each. Since its launch in February 2019, over Rs 4.27 lakh crore has been transferred to more than 11 crore farmer families cumulatively.

If you haven't received the 22nd installment yet, common reasons include incomplete eKYC, Aadhaar-bank account mismatch, incorrect IFSC code, or pending land record verification by your state government.

callout.heading: Complete eKYC before the 23rd installment
callout.content: eKYC is mandatory. Without it, your 23rd installment will be withheld regardless of when the government releases it. Complete eKYC online at pmkisan.gov.in (OTP method), via the PMKISAN app (face authentication), or at your nearest Common Service Centre (biometric).

faqs.question: When will PM Kisan 23rd installment be released?
faqs.answer: No official date has been announced. Based on the pattern of previous installments, the 23rd installment is expected in June–July 2026. The government typically announces the date 1-2 weeks before disbursement on pmkisan.gov.in.

faqs.question: How to check PM Kisan payment status?
faqs.answer: Visit pmkisan.gov.in, go to 'Farmers Corner', click 'Beneficiary Status', and enter your Aadhaar number or registered mobile number. The page shows all installments received along with dates and bank account details.

faqs.question: What to do if 22nd installment not received?
faqs.answer: Check your eKYC status, verify your Aadhaar is linked to the correct bank account, and ensure your mobile number is updated. Contact the PM Kisan helpline at 155261 or 011-24300606 if the issue persists after verification.
